title: Woolly Mammoths Are Closer Than You Think!

scenes.text: Woolly Mammoths may soon be resurrected using ancient DNA!
Scientists are using CRISPR technology to edit genes and bring them back.
This could help restore the ecosystem of the Arctic regions.
Mammoths could help combat climate change!
scenes.label: ECOLOGICAL WARRIORS

scenes.text: Follow if you love learning something new.

description: Woolly Mammoths could make a comeback through modern science! Discover the implications. Follow for daily facts!
